final:
module voltage_sensor (
    input [4:0] voltage_input,
    output reg [2:0] obf_voltage_category
);

always @(*) begin
    case (voltage_input)
        5'd0: obf_voltage_category = 3'b000; // 0mV
        5'd1: obf_voltage_category = 3'b000; // 1mV
        5'd2: obf_voltage_category = 3'b000; // 2mV
        5'd3: obf_voltage_category = 3'b000; // 3mV
        5'd4: obf_voltage_category = 3'b000; // 4mV
        5'd5: obf_voltage_category = 3'b000; // 5mV
        5'd6: obf_voltage_category = 3'b000; // 6mV
        5'd7: obf_voltage_category = 3'b000; // 7mV
        5'd8: obf_voltage_category = 3'b000; // 8mV
        5'd9: obf_voltage_category = 3'b000; // 9mV
        5'd10: obf_voltage_category = 3'b000; // 10mV
        5'd11: obf_voltage_category = 3'b001; // 11mV
        5'd12: obf_voltage_category = 3'b001; // 12mV
        5'd13: obf_voltage_category = 3'b001; // 13mV
        5'd14: obf_voltage_category = 3'b001; // 14mV
        5'd15: obf_voltage_category = 3'b001; // 15mV
        5'd16: obf_voltage_category = 3'b001; // 16mV
        5'd17: obf_voltage_category = 3'b001; // 17mV
        5'd18: obf_voltage_category = 3'b001; // 18mV
        5'd19: obf_voltage_category = 3'b001; // 19mV
        5'd20: obf_voltage_category = 3'b001; // 20mV
        5'd21: obf_voltage_category = 3'b010; // 21mV
        5'd22: obf_voltage_category = 3'b010; // 22mV
        5'd23: obf_voltage_category = 3'b010; // 23mV
        5'd24: obf_voltage_category = 3'b010; // 24mV
        5'd25: obf_voltage_category = 3'b010; // 25mV
        5'd26: obf_voltage_category = 3'b010; // 26mV
        5'd27: obf_voltage_category = 3'b010; // 27mV
        5'd28: obf_voltage_category = 3'b010; // 28mV
        5'd29: obf_voltage_category = 3'b010; // 29mV
        5'd30: obf_voltage_category = 3'b010; // 30mV
        5'd31: obf_voltage_category = 3'b011; // 31mV
        default: obf_voltage_category = 3'b111; // out of range
    endcase
end

endmodule
